arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly eyeing up a surprise transfer move for a young star who hasn’t even been part of the Arsenal set-up for that long. Italian defender Riccardo Calafiori joined the Gunners from Bologna last summer and has made a good impression in his first season at the Emirates Stadium. arts.ttl: Villarreal vs Real Madrid 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Villarreal are always a tough team to best at La Ceramica, so Real Madrid will need to play with composure and capitalize the scoring chances they create. Los Blancos have not had the time to prepare for this game and it's likely that Ancelotti will have to make some rotations, so earning the three points is the only priority here and a subpar performance would be understandable.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid monitoring Mainoo situation ahead of summer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are monitoring the situation of Manchester United midfielder Kobbie Mainoo ahead of the summer transfer window. Mainoo’s future with the club is up in the air with negotiations over a new deal having stalled. arts.ttl: Real Madrid star receives Brazil recall after Neymar withdrawal
arts.sum: Real Madrid starlet Endrick Felipe will join up with the Brazil senior squad next week for a key double header of matches. The 18-year-old – who already has three international goals for the Samba Boys – was initially overlooked by Dorival Junior. arts.ttl: Man Utd’s Quenda revenge: €95m Real Madrid deal would leave Chelsea fuming
arts.sum: Man Utd’s Quenda revenge: €95m Real Madrid deal would leave Chelsea fuming Real Madrid are plotting a blockbuster summer transfer raid on Manchester United, with the Bernabeu side ready to engage in talks over Kobbie Mainoo in a deal that would disrupt Chelsea's summer transfer plans.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid eye Spurs defender Cristian Romero
arts.sum: Real Madrid are eyeing a move for Tottenham Hotspur defender Cristian Romero, while Newcastle United are interested on-loan Juventus striker Randal Kolo Muani as a potential Alexander Isak successor. The 26-year-old, who is currently on loan from Paris Saint-Germain, is reported to be on the Magpies' short list as a potential replacement for Alexander Isak if he leaves St. James' Park in the summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's return plan for Bukayo Saka with Real Madrid fixture targeted
arts.sum: Arsenal face Real Madrid in the Champions League quarter-finals next month and Mikel Arteta hopes to have Bukayo Saka, who's been out injured since December, available once again
